title: Happy.appの開発状況を調べて、残タスクを教えて
summary_text: Concrete issue found: - `finally` teardown races with `app.js` boot lifecycle. In [test-ui-dom-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-ui-dom-contract.js#L479), globals are restored immediately after assertions, but `boot()` in `app.js` can still be running async sync work. This intermittently triggers `Happy.app boot failed ... Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'getElementById')` from `renderSyncStatus`. - Scenario orchestration via self-`execFileSync` in [test-ui-dom-contract.js](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/apps/happy-web/tests/test-ui-dom-contract.js#L496) is currently leaving hanging `node test-ui-dom-contract.js` processes in practice, so the test can stall instead of exiting cleanly.
